const std::vector< std::string > & outConstraints,

Definition at line 629 of file llvm_codegen.cpp.

635 {
636 llvm::Triple triple(module_->getTargetTriple());
637 std::vector<std::string> parts;
638 for (const auto &c : outConstraints)
639 parts.push_back(lowerAsmConstraintToLLVM(c, triple));
640 for (const auto &c : inConstraints)
641 parts.push_back(lowerAsmConstraintToLLVM(c, triple));
642 for (const auto &c : clobbers)
643 parts.push_back("~{" + c + "}");
644
645 std::string constraints;
646 for (size_t i = 0; i < parts.size(); ++i) {
647 if (i > 0)
648 constraints += ",";
649 constraints += parts[i];
650 }
651
652 llvm::Type *retTy;
653 if (outValueTypes.empty()) {
654 retTy = llvm::Type::getVoidTy(ctx_);
655 } else if (outValueTypes.size() == 1) {
656 retTy = outValueTypes[0];
657 } else {
658 retTy = llvm::StructType::get(ctx_, outValueTypes);
659 }
660
661 std::vector<llvm::Type *> paramTypes;
662 for (auto *v : inValues)
663 paramTypes.push_back(v->getType());
664
665 auto *fnTy = llvm::FunctionType::get(retTy, paramTypes, /*isVarArg=*/false);
666 auto *inlineAsm =
667 llvm::InlineAsm::get(fnTy, lowerGccAsmTemplateToLLVM(assembly),
668 constraints, /*hasSideEffects=*/true);
669 auto *call = builder_.CreateCall(inlineAsm, inValues);
670
671 if (outValueTypes.size() == 1) {
672 builder_.CreateStore(call, outAddrs[0]);
673 } else if (outValueTypes.size() > 1) {
674 for (unsigned i = 0; i < outValueTypes.size(); ++i) {
675 auto *field = builder_.CreateExtractValue(call, {i});
676 builder_.CreateStore(field, outAddrs[i]);
677 }
678 }
679}

◆ computeCyclicClasses()

void codegen::LLVMCodeGen::computeCyclicClasses ( const zir::Module & module)
private

Definition at line 222 of file llvm_codegen.cpp.

222 {
223 cyclicClasses_.clear();
224
225 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::shared_ptr<zir::ClassType>> classes;
226 for (const auto &type : module.getTypes()) {
227 if (type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
228 auto cls = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(type);
229 classes[cls->getName()] = cls;
230 }
231 }
232
233 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::vector<std::string>> subtypesOf;
234 for (const auto &[name, cls] : classes) {
235 for (auto cur = cls; cur; cur = cur->getBase()) {
236 subtypesOf[cur->getName()].push_back(name);
237 }
238 }
239
240 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::unordered_set<std::string>> edges;
241 for (const auto &[name, cls] : classes) {
242 auto &out = edges[name];
243 for (auto cur = cls; cur; cur = cur->getBase()) {
244 for (const auto &field : cur->getFields()) {
245 if (!field.type || field.type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Class) {
246 continue;
247 }
248 auto fieldClass = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(field.type);
249 if (fieldClass->isWeak()) {
250 continue;
251 }
252 auto it = subtypesOf.find(fieldClass->getName());
253 if (it == subtypesOf.end()) {
254 continue;
255 }
256 for (const auto &sub : it->second) {
257 out.insert(sub);
258 }
259 }
260 }
261 }
262
263 for (const auto &[start, _] : classes) {
264 std::vector<std::string> stack = {start};
265 std::unordered_set<std::string> seen;
266 bool cyclic = false;
267 while (!stack.empty()) {
268 std::string node = std::move(stack.back());
269 stack.pop_back();
270 auto it = edges.find(node);
271 if (it == edges.end()) {
272 continue;
273 }
274 for (const auto &next : it->second) {
275 if (next == start) {
276 cyclic = true;
277 break;
278 }
279 if (seen.insert(next).second) {
280 stack.push_back(next);
281 }
282 }
283 if (cyclic) {
284 break;
285 }
286 }
287 if (cyclic) {
288 cyclicClasses_.insert(start);
289 }
290 }
291}

◆ emitAssemblyFile()

bool codegen::LLVMCodeGen::emitAssemblyFile ( const std::string & path,
int optimization_level = 0 )

Definition at line 343 of file llvm_codegen.cpp.

344 {
345 llvm::Triple triple(targetTriple_);
346 module_->setTargetTriple(triple);
347 std::string error;
348 const auto *target = llvm::TargetRegistry::lookupTarget(triple, error);
349 if (!target) {
350 llvm::errs() << "Target lookup failed: " << error << "\n";
351 return false;
352 }
353
354 llvm::TargetOptions opts;
355 std::unique_ptr<llvm::TargetMachine> tm(target->createTargetMachine(
356 triple, "generic", "", opts, llvm::Reloc::PIC_, std::nullopt,
357 toCodeGenOptLevel(optimization_level)));
358 if (!tm) {
359 llvm::errs() << "Failed to create target machine for: " << targetTriple_
360 << "\n";
361 return false;
362 }
363 module_->setDataLayout(tm->createDataLayout());
364
365 std::error_code ec;
366 llvm::raw_fd_ostream dest(path, ec, llvm::sys::fs::OF_None);
367 if (ec) {
368 llvm::errs() << "Cannot open output file: " << ec.message() << "\n";
369 return false;
370 }
371
372 llvm::legacy::PassManager pm;
373 if (tm->addPassesToEmitFile(pm, dest, nullptr,
374 llvm::CodeGenFileType::AssemblyFile)) {
375 llvm::errs() << "TargetMachine cannot emit assembly file\n";
376 return false;
377 }
378
379 bool is_broken = llvm::verifyModule(*module_, &llvm::errs());
380 if (!is_broken) {
381 pm.run(*module_);
382 }
383 dest.flush();
384 return !is_broken;
385}

1285

1287 for (; llvmArgIt != currentFn_->arg_end(); ++llvmArgIt) {
1288 physicalArgs.push_back(&*llvmArgIt);
1289 }
1290
1291 for (size_t i = 0; i < fn.getBlocks().size(); ++i) {
1292 const auto &block = fn.getBlocks()[i];
1293 if (!freestanding_ && fn.name == "main" && i == 0 &&
1294 zirBlockMap_.count(block->label) != 0) {
1295 continue;
1296 }
1297 zirBlockMap_[block->label] =
1298 llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, block->label, currentFn_);

1302 builder_.SetInsertPoint(argInsertBlock, argInsertBlock->begin());

1305 if (arg->isVariadicPack()) {

1307 static_cast<llvm::StructType *>(toLLVMType(*arg->getType()));
1308 llvm::Value *sliceValue = llvm::PoisonValue::get(sliceTy);
1309 llvm::Value *countValue = physicalArgs.at(physicalArgIndex++);
1310 llvm::Value *dataValue = physicalArgs.at(physicalArgIndex++);
1311 sliceValue = builder_.CreateInsertValue(sliceValue, dataValue, {0},
1312 arg->getRawName() + ".data");
1313 if (countValue->getType() != sliceTy->getElementType(1)) {
1314 countValue = builder_.CreateIntCast(
1315 countValue, sliceTy->getElementType(1),
1316 /*isSigned=*/true, arg->getRawName() + ".len.cast");
1317 }
1318 sliceValue = builder_.CreateInsertValue(sliceValue, countValue, {1},
1319 arg->getRawName() + ".len");
1320 zirValueMap_[arg.get()] = sliceValue;
1321 continue;
1322 }
1323 zirValueMap_[arg.get()] = physicalArgs.at(physicalArgIndex++);
1324 }
1325
1326 for (const auto &block : fn.getBlocks()) {
1327 builder_.SetInsertPoint(zirBlockMap_.at(block->label));
1328 for (const auto &inst : block->getInstructions()) {
1329 emitZIRInstruction(*inst);
1330 if (builder_.GetInsertBlock()->getTerminator()) {
1331 break;
1332 }
1333 }
1334
1335 auto *endBlock = builder_.GetInsertBlock();
1336 if (endBlock && endBlock->getTerminator()) {
1337 zirBlockExitMap_[block->label] = endBlock;
1338 } else {
1339 zirBlockExitMap_[block->label] = zirBlockMap_.at(block->label);
1340 }
1341 }
1342
1343 currentFn_ = nullptr;
1344 currentZIRFunction_ = nullptr;
1345 zirBlockMap_.clear();
1346 zirValueMap_.clear();
1347 zirOwnedClassValues_.clear();
1348 zirOwnedStringValues_.clear();
1349 zirBlockExitMap_.clear();

308 currentZIRFunction_->getArguments()[zirParamSpillIndex_]

319 alloca);
320 if (isParamSpill) {
321 zirClassParamAllocas_.insert(allocaInst.getResult().get());
322 zirPendingClassParamInitAllocas_.insert(allocaInst.getResult().get());
323 }
324 if (!isBorrowedSelf) {
325 zirFunctionClassLocals_.push_back(

327 }
328 } else if (isOwnedStringType(allocaInst.getAllocatedType())) {
329 builder_.CreateStore(llvm::Constant::getNullValue(
330 toLLVMType(*allocaInst.getAllocatedType())),
331 alloca);
332 zirFunctionStringLocals_.push_back(
333 {allocaInst.getAllocatedType(), alloca});
334 }
335 if (isParamSpill) {
336 ++zirParamSpillIndex_;
337 }
338 return;
339 }
340 case OpCode::Load: {
341 const auto &loadInst = static_cast<const LoadInst &>(inst);
342 auto *src = lowerZIRValue(loadInst.getSource());
343 auto *value = builder_.CreateLoad(
344 toLLVMType(*loadInst.getResult()->getType()), src,
345 static_cast<const Register &>(*loadInst.getResult()).getRawName());
346 zirValueMap_[loadInst.getResult().get()] = value;
347 return;
348 }
349 case OpCode::Store: {

351 auto *dst = lowerZIRValue(storeInst.getDestination());
352 auto *src = lowerZIRRValue(storeInst.getSource());
353 auto dstType = storeInst.getDestination()->getType();
354 auto ptrType = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(dstType);
355 auto valueType = ptrType ? ptrType->getBaseType() : nullptr;
356 bool skipReleaseOld = storeInst.initStore();
357 if (storeInst.bypassArc()) {
358 builder_.CreateStore(src, dst);
359 } else if (valueType && isClassType(valueType)) {
360 if (zirPendingClassParamInitAllocas_.count(
361 storeInst.getDestination().get()) > 0) {
362 builder_.CreateStore(src, dst);

365 } else {

369 if (valueIsOwned) {
370 zirOwnedClassValues_.erase(storeInst.getSource().get());

372 }

374 bool valueIsOwned =
375 zirOwnedStringValues_.count(storeInst.getSource().get()) > 0;
376 emitStoreWithStringArc(dst, src, valueType, valueIsOwned, skipReleaseOld);
377 if (valueIsOwned) {
378 zirOwnedStringValues_.erase(storeInst.getSource().get());
379 }
380 } else {
381 builder_.CreateStore(src, dst);
382 }
383 return;
384 }
385 case OpCode::Add:
386 case OpCode::Sub:
387 case OpCode::Mul:
388 case OpCode::SDiv:
389 case OpCode::UDiv:
390 case OpCode::SRem:
391 case OpCode::URem:
392 case OpCode::Shl:
393 case OpCode::LShr:
394 case OpCode::AShr:
395 case OpCode::BitAnd:
396 case OpCode::BitOr:
397 case OpCode::BitXor: {
398 const auto &binaryInst = static_cast<const BinaryInst &>(inst);
399 auto *lhs = lowerZIRRValue(binaryInst.getLhs());
400 auto *rhs = lowerZIRRValue(binaryInst.getRhs());
401 llvm::Value *result = nullptr;
402 bool lhsIsPointer =
403 binaryInst.getLhs()->getType()->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Pointer;
404 bool rhsIsPointer =
405 binaryInst.getRhs()->getType()->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Pointer;
406 switch (inst.getOpCode()) {
407 case OpCode::Add:
408 if (isStringType(binaryInst.getLhs()->getType()) ||
409 isStringType(binaryInst.getRhs()->getType()) ||
410 binaryInst.getLhs()->getType()->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Char ||
411 binaryInst.getRhs()->getType()->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Char) {
412 result = emitStringConcat(lhs, rhs, binaryInst.getLhs()->getType(),
413 binaryInst.getRhs()->getType(),
414 binaryInst.getResult()->getType());
415 if (isOwnedStringType(binaryInst.getResult()->getType())) {
416 zirOwnedStringValues_.insert(binaryInst.getResult().get());
417 }
418 } else if (lhsIsPointer || rhsIsPointer) {
419 llvm::Value *pointerValue = lhsIsPointer ? lhs : rhs;
420 llvm::Value *offsetValue = lhsIsPointer ? rhs : lhs;
421 auto pointerType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(
422 lhsIsPointer ? binaryInst.getLhs()->getType()
423 : binaryInst.getRhs()->getType());
424 auto *elemTy = toLLVMType(*pointerType->getBaseType());
425 auto *indexTy = llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_);
426 auto *index =
427 builder_.CreateIntCast(offsetValue, indexTy, /*isSigned=*/true);
428 result = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(elemTy, pointerValue, index);
429 } else if (lhs->getType()->isFloatingPointTy()) {
430 result = builder_.CreateFAdd(lhs, rhs);
431 } else {
432 result = builder_.CreateAdd(lhs, rhs);
433 }
434 break;
435 case OpCode::Sub:
436 if (lhsIsPointer && rhsIsPointer) {
437 auto pointerType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(
438 binaryInst.getLhs()->getType());
439 auto *elemTy = toLLVMType(*pointerType->getBaseType());
440 auto *i64Ty = llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_);
441 auto *lhsInt = builder_.CreatePtrToInt(lhs, i64Ty);
442 auto *rhsInt = builder_.CreatePtrToInt(rhs, i64Ty);
443 auto *bytes = builder_.CreateSub(lhsInt, rhsInt);
444 llvm::Value *elemSize = llvm::ConstantExpr::getSizeOf(elemTy);
445 if (elemSize->getType() != i64Ty) {
446 elemSize = builder_.CreateIntCast(elemSize, i64Ty, false);
447 }
448 result = builder_.CreateSDiv(bytes, elemSize);
449 } else if (lhsIsPointer) {
450 auto pointerType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(
451 binaryInst.getLhs()->getType());
452 auto *elemTy = toLLVMType(*pointerType->getBaseType());
453 auto *indexTy = llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_);
454 auto *index = builder_.CreateIntCast(rhs, indexTy, /*isSigned=*/true);
455 index = builder_.CreateNeg(index);
456 result = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(elemTy, lhs, index);
457 } else if (lhs->getType()->isFloatingPointTy()) {
458 result = builder_.CreateFSub(lhs, rhs);
459 } else {
460 result = builder_.CreateSub(lhs, rhs);
461 }
462 break;
463 case OpCode::Mul:
464 result = lhs->getType()->isFloatingPointTy()
465 ? builder_.CreateFMul(lhs, rhs)
466 : builder_.CreateMul(lhs, rhs);
467 break;
468 case OpCode::SDiv:
469 result = lhs->getType()->isFloatingPointTy()
470 ? builder_.CreateFDiv(lhs, rhs)
471 : builder_.CreateSDiv(lhs, rhs);
472 break;
473 case OpCode::UDiv:
474 result = lhs->getType()->isFloatingPointTy()
475 ? builder_.CreateFDiv(lhs, rhs)
476 : builder_.CreateUDiv(lhs, rhs);
477 break;
478 case OpCode::SRem:
479 result = lhs->getType()->isFloatingPointTy()
480 ? builder_.CreateFRem(lhs, rhs)
481 : builder_.CreateSRem(lhs, rhs);
482 break;
483 case OpCode::URem:
484 result = lhs->getType()->isFloatingPointTy()
485 ? builder_.CreateFRem(lhs, rhs)
486 : builder_.CreateURem(lhs, rhs);
487 break;
488 case OpCode::Shl:
489 result = builder_.CreateShl(lhs, rhs);
490 break;
491 case OpCode::LShr:
492 result = builder_.CreateLShr(lhs, rhs);
493 break;
494 case OpCode::AShr:
495 result = builder_.CreateAShr(lhs, rhs);
496 break;
497 case OpCode::BitAnd:
498 result = builder_.CreateAnd(lhs, rhs);
499 break;
500 case OpCode::BitOr:
501 result = builder_.CreateOr(lhs, rhs);
502 break;
503 case OpCode::BitXor:
504 result = builder_.CreateXor(lhs, rhs);
505 break;
506 default:
507 break;
508 }
509 zirValueMap_[binaryInst.getResult().get()] = result;
510 return;
511 }
512 case OpCode::Cmp: {
513 const auto &cmpInst = static_cast<const CmpInst &>(inst);
514 auto *lhs = lowerZIRRValue(cmpInst.getLhs());
515 auto *rhs = lowerZIRRValue(cmpInst.getRhs());
516 llvm::Value *result = nullptr;
517 const auto &pred = cmpInst.getPredicate();
518 auto *lhsTy = lhs->getType();
519 auto *rhsTy = rhs->getType();
520 if (lhsTy != rhsTy) {
521 if (lhsTy->isIntegerTy() && rhsTy->isIntegerTy()) {
522 unsigned lhsBits = lhsTy->getIntegerBitWidth();
523 unsigned rhsBits = rhsTy->getIntegerBitWidth();
524 if (lhsBits < rhsBits) {
525 bool lhsUnsigned = cmpInst.getLhs() && cmpInst.getLhs()->getType()
526 ? cmpInst.getLhs()->getType()->isUnsigned()
527 : false;
528 lhs = lhsUnsigned ? builder_.CreateZExt(lhs, rhsTy)
529 : builder_.CreateSExt(lhs, rhsTy);
530 lhsTy = lhs->getType();
531 } else if (rhsBits < lhsBits) {
532 bool rhsUnsigned = cmpInst.getRhs() && cmpInst.getRhs()->getType()
533 ? cmpInst.getRhs()->getType()->isUnsigned()
534 : false;
535 rhs = rhsUnsigned ? builder_.CreateZExt(rhs, lhsTy)
536 : builder_.CreateSExt(rhs, lhsTy);
537 rhsTy = rhs->getType();
538 }
539 } else if (lhsTy->isFloatingPointTy() && rhsTy->isFloatingPointTy()) {
540 unsigned lhsBits = lhsTy->getPrimitiveSizeInBits();
541 unsigned rhsBits = rhsTy->getPrimitiveSizeInBits();
542 if (lhsBits < rhsBits) {
543 lhs = builder_.CreateFPExt(lhs, rhsTy);
544 lhsTy = lhs->getType();
545 } else if (rhsBits < lhsBits) {
546 rhs = builder_.CreateFPExt(rhs, lhsTy);
547 rhsTy = rhs->getType();
548 }
549 } else if (lhsTy->isIntegerTy() && rhsTy->isFloatingPointTy()) {
550 bool lhsUnsigned = cmpInst.getLhs() && cmpInst.getLhs()->getType()
551 ? cmpInst.getLhs()->getType()->isUnsigned()
552 : false;
553 lhs = lhsUnsigned ? builder_.CreateUIToFP(lhs, rhsTy)
554 : builder_.CreateSIToFP(lhs, rhsTy);
555 lhsTy = lhs->getType();
556 } else if (lhsTy->isFloatingPointTy() && rhsTy->isIntegerTy()) {
557 bool rhsUnsigned = cmpInst.getRhs() && cmpInst.getRhs()->getType()
558 ? cmpInst.getRhs()->getType()->isUnsigned()
559 : false;
560 rhs = rhsUnsigned ? builder_.CreateUIToFP(rhs, lhsTy)
561 : builder_.CreateSIToFP(rhs, lhsTy);
562 rhsTy = rhs->getType();
563 }
564 }
565 if (lhsTy != rhsTy) {
566 throw std::runtime_error(
567 "ZIR cmp operand type mismatch after coercion: " +
568 cmpInst.getLhs()->getTypeName() + " vs " +
569 cmpInst.getRhs()->getTypeName());
570 }
571 if (isStringLLVMStructType(lhsTy) && isStringLLVMStructType(rhsTy) &&
572 (pred == "eq" || pred == "ne")) {
573 auto *boolTy = llvm::Type::getInt1Ty(ctx_);
574 auto *strTy = lhsTy;
575 auto *eqFnTy = llvm::FunctionType::get(boolTy, {strTy, strTy}, false);
576 auto eqCallee = module_->getOrInsertFunction("eq", eqFnTy);
577 auto *isEq = builder_.CreateCall(eqFnTy, eqCallee.getCallee(), {lhs, rhs},
578 "str.eq");
579 zirValueMap_[cmpInst.getResult().get()] =
580 pred == "eq" ? isEq : builder_.CreateNot(isEq, "str.ne");
581 return;
582 }
583 if (lhsTy->isFloatingPointTy()) {
584 if (pred == "eq")
585 result = builder_.CreateFCmpOEQ(lhs, rhs);
586 else if (pred == "ne")
587 result = builder_.CreateFCmpONE(lhs, rhs);
588 else if (pred == "slt" || pred == "ult")
589 result = builder_.CreateFCmpOLT(lhs, rhs);
590 else if (pred == "sle" || pred == "ule")
591 result = builder_.CreateFCmpOLE(lhs, rhs);
592 else if (pred == "sgt" || pred == "ugt")
593 result = builder_.CreateFCmpOGT(lhs, rhs);
594 else if (pred == "sge" || pred == "uge")
595 result = builder_.CreateFCmpOGE(lhs, rhs);
596 } else if (lhsTy->isIntOrIntVectorTy() || lhsTy->isPtrOrPtrVectorTy()) {
597 if (pred == "eq")
598 result = builder_.CreateICmpEQ(lhs, rhs);
599 else if (pred == "ne")
600 result = builder_.CreateICmpNE(lhs, rhs);
601 else if (pred == "slt")
602 result = builder_.CreateICmpSLT(lhs, rhs);
603 else if (pred == "sle")
604 result = builder_.CreateICmpSLE(lhs, rhs);
605 else if (pred == "sgt")
606 result = builder_.CreateICmpSGT(lhs, rhs);
607 else if (pred == "sge")
608 result = builder_.CreateICmpSGE(lhs, rhs);
609 else if (pred == "ult")
610 result = builder_.CreateICmpULT(lhs, rhs);
611 else if (pred == "ule")
612 result = builder_.CreateICmpULE(lhs, rhs);
613 else if (pred == "ugt")
614 result = builder_.CreateICmpUGT(lhs, rhs);
615 else if (pred == "uge")
616 result = builder_.CreateICmpUGE(lhs, rhs);
617 }
618 if (!result) {
619 throw std::runtime_error("unsupported ZIR cmp predicate/type: " + pred +
620 " on " + cmpInst.getLhs()->getTypeName());
621 }
622 zirValueMap_[cmpInst.getResult().get()] = result;
623 return;
624 }
625 case OpCode::Br: {
626 const auto &branchInst = static_cast<const BranchInst &>(inst);
627 builder_.CreateBr(zirBlockMap_.at(branchInst.getTarget()));
628 return;
629 }
630 case OpCode::CondBr: {
631 const auto &branchInst = static_cast<const CondBranchInst &>(inst);
632 builder_.CreateCondBr(lowerZIRRValue(branchInst.getCondition()),
633 zirBlockMap_.at(branchInst.getTrueLabel()),
634 zirBlockMap_.at(branchInst.getFalseLabel()));
635 return;
636 }
637 case OpCode::Ret: {
638 const auto &returnInst = static_cast<const ReturnInst &>(inst);
639 if (returnInst.getValue()) {
640 auto *retValue = lowerZIRRValue(returnInst.getValue());
641 auto retType = returnInst.getValue()->getType();
642 if (isClassType(retType) &&
643 zirOwnedClassValues_.count(returnInst.getValue().get()) == 0) {
644 emitRetainIfNeeded(retValue, retType);
645 } else if (isOwnedStringType(retType) &&
646 zirOwnedStringValues_.count(returnInst.getValue().get()) ==
647 0) {
648 retValue = emitStringRetainIfNeeded(retValue, retType);
649 }
650 for (auto it = zirFunctionClassLocals_.rbegin();
651 it != zirFunctionClassLocals_.rend(); ++it) {
652 auto *value = builder_.CreateLoad(toLLVMType(*it->first), it->second,
653 "zir.arc.ret.release");
654 if (isWeakClassType(it->first)) {
655 emitReleaseWeakIfNeeded(value, it->first);
656 } else {
657 emitReleaseIfNeeded(value, it->first);
658 }
659 }
660 for (auto it = zirFunctionStringLocals_.rbegin();
661 it != zirFunctionStringLocals_.rend(); ++it) {
662 auto *value = builder_.CreateLoad(toLLVMType(*it->first), it->second,
663 "zir.str.ret.release");
664 emitStringReleaseIfNeeded(value, it->first);
665 }
666 builder_.CreateRet(retValue);
667 } else {
668 for (auto it = zirFunctionClassLocals_.rbegin();
669 it != zirFunctionClassLocals_.rend(); ++it) {
670 auto *value = builder_.CreateLoad(toLLVMType(*it->first), it->second,
671 "zir.arc.ret.release");
672 if (isWeakClassType(it->first)) {
673 emitReleaseWeakIfNeeded(value, it->first);
674 } else {
675 emitReleaseIfNeeded(value, it->first);
676 }
677 }
678 for (auto it = zirFunctionStringLocals_.rbegin();
679 it != zirFunctionStringLocals_.rend(); ++it) {
680 auto *value = builder_.CreateLoad(toLLVMType(*it->first), it->second,
681 "zir.str.ret.release");
682 emitStringReleaseIfNeeded(value, it->first);
683 }
684 builder_.CreateRetVoid();
685 }
686 return;
687 }
688 case OpCode::Call: {
689 const auto &callInst = static_cast<const CallInst &>(inst);
690 std::vector<llvm::Value *> args;
691
692 if (callInst.isIndirect()) {
693 auto *calleePtr = lowerZIRRValue(callInst.getCalleeValue());
694 const auto &fpType = static_cast<const zir::FunctionPointerType &>(
695 *callInst.getCalleeValue()->getType());
696 std::vector<llvm::Type *> paramTypes;
697 for (const auto &p : fpType.getParams())
698 paramTypes.push_back(toLLVMType(*p));
699 auto *fnTy = llvm::FunctionType::get(toLLVMType(*fpType.getReturnType()),
700 paramTypes, false);
701 for (const auto &arg : callInst.getArguments())
702 args.push_back(lowerZIRRValue(arg));
703 auto *call = builder_.CreateCall(fnTy, calleePtr, args);
704 if (callInst.getResult()) {
705 zirValueMap_[callInst.getResult().get()] = call;
706 if (callInst.returnsRef()) {
707 refReturnValues_.insert(callInst.getResult().get());
708 }
709 }
710 return;
711 }
712
713 auto calleeIt = functionMap_.find(callInst.getFunctionName());
714 if (calleeIt == functionMap_.end()) {
715 auto zirDeclIt = zirFunctionMap_.find(callInst.getFunctionName());
716 if (zirDeclIt != zirFunctionMap_.end()) {
717 declareZIRFunction(*zirDeclIt->second, true);
718 calleeIt = functionMap_.find(callInst.getFunctionName());
719 }
720 }
721 if (calleeIt == functionMap_.end()) {
722 auto *existing = module_->getFunction(callInst.getFunctionName());
723 if (!existing) {
724 std::vector<llvm::Type *> inferredParamTypes;
725 inferredParamTypes.reserve(callInst.getArguments().size());
726 for (size_t i = 0; i < callInst.getArguments().size(); ++i) {
727 bool isRef = i < callInst.getArgumentIsRef().size() &&
728 callInst.getArgumentIsRef()[i];
729 auto *argTy =
730 isRef ? lowerZIRValue(callInst.getArguments()[i])->getType()
731 : lowerZIRRValue(callInst.getArguments()[i])->getType();
732 inferredParamTypes.push_back(argTy);
733 }
734
735 llvm::Type *retTy = llvm::Type::getVoidTy(ctx_);
736 if (callInst.getResult()) {
737 retTy = toLLVMType(*callInst.getResult()->getType());
738 }
739
740 auto *fnTy = llvm::FunctionType::get(retTy, inferredParamTypes, false);
741 existing = llvm::Function::Create(fnTy, llvm::Function::ExternalLinkage,
742 callInst.getFunctionName(), *module_);
743 }
744
745 functionMap_[callInst.getFunctionName()] = existing;
746 calleeIt = functionMap_.find(callInst.getFunctionName());
747 }
748 if (calleeIt == functionMap_.end()) {
749 throw std::runtime_error("missing callee in LLVM function map: " +
750 callInst.getFunctionName());
751 }
752 auto *callee = calleeIt->second;
753 auto *calleeTy = callee->getFunctionType();
754 auto zirIt = zirFunctionMap_.find(callInst.getFunctionName());
755 size_t fixedParamCount = callInst.getArguments().size();
756 bool hasVariadicParameter = false;
757 std::shared_ptr<zir::Type> variadicElementType = nullptr;
758 bool isCVariadic = calleeTy->isVarArg();
759 if (zirIt != zirFunctionMap_.end()) {
760 fixedParamCount = 0;
761 for (const auto &param : zirIt->second->getArguments()) {
762 if (param->isVariadicPack()) {
763 hasVariadicParameter = true;
764 variadicElementType = param->getVariadicElementType();
765 break;
766 }
767 ++fixedParamCount;
768 }
769 isCVariadic = zirIt->second->isCVariadic;
770 }
771 for (size_t i = 0; i < callInst.getArguments().size(); ++i) {
772 bool isRef = i < callInst.getArgumentIsRef().size() &&
773 callInst.getArgumentIsRef()[i];
774 auto *arg = isRef ? lowerZIRValue(callInst.getArguments()[i])
775 : lowerZIRRValue(callInst.getArguments()[i]);
776 std::shared_ptr<zir::Type> calleeParamType = nullptr;
777 if (zirIt != zirFunctionMap_.end() && i < fixedParamCount &&
778 i < zirIt->second->getArguments().size()) {
779 calleeParamType = zirIt->second->getArguments()[i]->getType();
780 }
781 llvm::Type *paramTy = nullptr;
782 if (i < fixedParamCount &&
783 static_cast<unsigned>(i) < calleeTy->getNumParams()) {
784 paramTy = calleeTy->getParamType(static_cast<unsigned>(i));
785 }
786 if (paramTy && arg->getType() != paramTy) {
787 if (isStringLLVMStructType(arg->getType()) &&
788 isStringLLVMStructType(paramTy)) {
789 auto *ptr = builder_.CreateExtractValue(arg, {0}, "zir.call.str.ptr");
790 auto *len = builder_.CreateExtractValue(arg, {1}, "zir.call.str.len");
791 llvm::Value *converted = llvm::UndefValue::get(paramTy);
792 converted = builder_.CreateInsertValue(converted, ptr, {0},
793 "zir.call.str.ptr.i");
794 converted = builder_.CreateInsertValue(converted, len, {1},
795 "zir.call.str.len.i");
796 arg = converted;
797 }
798 auto *argPtrTy = llvm::dyn_cast<llvm::PointerType>(arg->getType());
799 if (argPtrTy && !paramTy->isPointerTy()) {
800 arg = builder_.CreateLoad(paramTy, arg, "zir.call.arg");
801 }
802 } else if (isCVariadic && i >= fixedParamCount) {
803 // C varargs default argument promotions:
804 // - integer types narrower than int -> int
805 // - float -> double
806 // (already-typed varargs keep their value category)
807 auto *argTy = arg->getType();
808 if (argTy->isIntegerTy()) {
809 unsigned bits = argTy->getIntegerBitWidth();
810 if (bits < 32) {
811 auto argType = callInst.getArguments()[i]
812 ? callInst.getArguments()[i]->getType()
813 : nullptr;
814 bool isUnsignedArg =
815 argType && (argType->isUnsigned() ||
816 argType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Bool ||
817 argType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Char);
818 auto *i32Ty = llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_);
819 arg = isUnsignedArg
820 ? builder_.CreateZExt(arg, i32Ty, "cvararg.zext")
821 : builder_.CreateSExt(arg, i32Ty, "cvararg.sext");
822 }
823 } else if (argTy->isFloatTy()) {
824 auto *f64Ty = llvm::Type::getDoubleTy(ctx_);
825 arg = builder_.CreateFPExt(arg, f64Ty, "cvararg.fpext");
826 }
827 }
828 bool isBorrowedSelfArg =
829 zirIt != zirFunctionMap_.end() && i == 0 &&
830 !zirIt->second->ownerTypeName.empty() &&
831 i < zirIt->second->getArguments().size() &&
832 zirIt->second->getArguments()[i]->getRawName() == "self";
833 if (!isRef && i < fixedParamCount && !isBorrowedSelfArg &&
834 !(calleeParamType && isWeakClassType(calleeParamType)) &&
835 isClassType(callInst.getArguments()[i]->getType()) &&
836 zirOwnedClassValues_.count(callInst.getArguments()[i].get()) == 0) {
837 emitRetainIfNeeded(arg, callInst.getArguments()[i]->getType());
838 }
839 args.push_back(arg);
840 }
841 if (hasVariadicParameter) {
842 auto *elemTy = toLLVMType(*variadicElementType);
843 auto *elemPtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(elemTy);
844 size_t explicitVariadicCount =
845 callInst.getArguments().size() - fixedParamCount;
846
847 llvm::Value *forwardedCount =
848 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 0);
849 llvm::Value *forwardedData = llvm::ConstantPointerNull::get(elemPtrTy);
850 if (callInst.getVariadicPack()) {
851 auto *packValue = lowerZIRRValue(callInst.getVariadicPack());
852 forwardedData =
853 builder_.CreateExtractValue(packValue, {0}, "varargs.forward.data");
854 forwardedCount =
855 builder_.CreateExtractValue(packValue, {1}, "varargs.forward.len");
856 if (forwardedCount->getType() != llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_)) {
857 forwardedCount = builder_.CreateIntCast(
858 forwardedCount, llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), /*isSigned=*/true);
859 }
860 }
861
862 llvm::Value *explicitCount =
863 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_),
864 static_cast<uint64_t>(explicitVariadicCount));
865
866 if (explicitVariadicCount == 0 && !callInst.getVariadicPack()) {
867 args.push_back(explicitCount);
868 args.push_back(llvm::ConstantPointerNull::get(elemPtrTy));
869 } else if (explicitVariadicCount == 0) {
870 args.push_back(forwardedCount);
871 args.push_back(forwardedData);
872 } else {
873 llvm::Value *totalCount = explicitCount;
874 if (callInst.getVariadicPack()) {
875 totalCount = builder_.CreateAdd(explicitCount, forwardedCount,
876 "varargs.total");
877 }
878
879 auto *buffer = builder_.CreateAlloca(elemTy, totalCount, "varargs.buf");
880 for (size_t i = 0; i < explicitVariadicCount; ++i) {
881 auto *dst = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(
882 elemTy, buffer,
883 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_),
884 static_cast<uint64_t>(i)));
885 builder_.CreateStore(args[fixedParamCount + i], dst);
886 }
887
888 if (callInst.getVariadicPack()) {
889 auto *copyCondBB =
890 llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, "varargs.copy.cond", currentFn_);
891 auto *copyBodyBB =
892 llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, "varargs.copy.body", currentFn_);
893 auto *copyDoneBB =
894 llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, "varargs.copy.done", currentFn_);
895 auto *copyPreheaderBB = builder_.GetInsertBlock();
896
897 builder_.CreateBr(copyCondBB);
898 builder_.SetInsertPoint(copyCondBB);
899 auto *indexPhi =
900 builder_.CreatePHI(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 2, "varargs.i");
901 indexPhi->addIncoming(
902 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 0),
903 copyPreheaderBB);
904 auto *cond =
905 builder_.CreateICmpULT(indexPhi, forwardedCount, "varargs.cond");
906 builder_.CreateCondBr(cond, copyBodyBB, copyDoneBB);
907
908 builder_.SetInsertPoint(copyBodyBB);
909 auto *src = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(elemTy, forwardedData,
910 indexPhi, "varargs.src");
911 auto *srcVal = builder_.CreateLoad(elemTy, src, "varargs.load");
912 auto *dstIndex = builder_.CreateAdd(indexPhi, explicitCount);
913 auto *dst = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(elemTy, buffer, dstIndex,
914 "varargs.dst");
915 builder_.CreateStore(srcVal, dst);
916 auto *next = builder_.CreateAdd(
917 indexPhi,
918 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 1));
919 builder_.CreateBr(copyCondBB);
920 indexPhi->addIncoming(next, copyBodyBB);
921
922 builder_.SetInsertPoint(copyDoneBB);
923 }
924
925 args.erase(args.begin() + static_cast<std::ptrdiff_t>(fixedParamCount),
926 args.end());
927 args.push_back(totalCount);
928 args.push_back(buffer);
929 }
930 } else if (isCVariadic) {
931 // Extra arguments are passed through unchanged after the fixed params.
932 }
933 llvm::Value *call = nullptr;
934 if (zirIt != zirFunctionMap_.end() && zirIt->second->vtableSlot >= 0 &&
935 !args.empty()) {
936 auto receiverType = callInst.getArguments().front()->getType();
937 std::shared_ptr<zir::ClassType> classType = nullptr;
938 if (receiverType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
939 classType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(receiverType);
940 } else if (receiverType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Pointer) {
941 auto baseType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(receiverType)
942 ->getBaseType();
943 if (baseType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
944 classType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(baseType);
945 }
946 }
947
948 if (classType) {
949 auto *objectTy = structCache_.at(classType->getCodegenName() + ".obj");
950 auto *selfPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
951 args[0], llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(objectTy), "zir.method.self");
952 auto *vtableAddr = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
953 objectTy, selfPtr, kClassVTableIndex, "zir.method.vtable.addr");
954 auto *i8PtrTy =
955 llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_));
956 auto *vtablePtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(i8PtrTy);
957 auto *vtablePtr =
958 builder_.CreateLoad(vtablePtrTy, vtableAddr, "zir.method.vtable");
959 auto *slotAddr = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(
960 i8PtrTy, vtablePtr,
961 llvm::ConstantInt::get(
962 llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_),
963 static_cast<uint64_t>(zirIt->second->vtableSlot)));
964 auto *fnRaw =
965 builder_.CreateLoad(i8PtrTy, slotAddr, "zir.method.fn.raw");
966 auto *fnPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
967 fnRaw, llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(calleeTy), "zir.method.fn");
968 call = builder_.CreateCall(calleeTy, fnPtr, args);
969 }
970 }
971 if (!call) {
972 call = builder_.CreateCall(callee, args);
973 }
974 if (callInst.getResult()) {
975 zirValueMap_[callInst.getResult().get()] = call;
976 if (callInst.returnsRef()) {
977 refReturnValues_.insert(callInst.getResult().get());
978 }
979 if (isClassType(callInst.getResult()->getType())) {
980 zirOwnedClassValues_.insert(callInst.getResult().get());
981 } else if (isOwnedStringType(callInst.getResult()->getType())) {
982 zirOwnedStringValues_.insert(callInst.getResult().get());
983 }
984 }
985 return;
986 }
987 case OpCode::GetElementPtr: {
988 const auto &gepInst = static_cast<const GetElementPtrInst &>(inst);
989 auto *ptr = lowerZIRValue(gepInst.getPointer());
990 auto operandType = gepInst.getPointer()->getType();
991 auto pointerType = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(operandType);
992 auto baseType = pointerType ? pointerType->getBaseType() : operandType;
993 llvm::Value *gep = nullptr;
994
995 if (baseType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Record) {
996 auto recordType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::RecordType>(baseType);
997 auto *structTy = llvm::cast<llvm::StructType>(toLLVMType(*recordType));
998 llvm::Value *structPtr = ptr;
999 if (!pointerType) {
1000 auto *tmp = createEntryAlloca(
1001 currentFn_,
1002 static_cast<const Register &>(*gepInst.getResult()).getRawName() +
1003 ".addr",
1004 structTy);
1005 builder_.CreateStore(ptr, tmp);
1006 structPtr = tmp;
1007 }
1008 gep = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
1009 structTy, structPtr, static_cast<unsigned>(gepInst.getIndex()),
1010 static_cast<const Register &>(*gepInst.getResult()).getRawName());
1011 } else if (baseType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::TaggedUnion) {
1012 auto taggedUnionType =
1013 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::TaggedUnionType>(baseType);
1014 auto *structTy =
1015 llvm::cast<llvm::StructType>(toLLVMType(*taggedUnionType));
1016 llvm::Value *structPtr = ptr;
1017 if (!pointerType) {
1018 auto *tmp = createEntryAlloca(
1019 currentFn_,
1020 static_cast<const Register &>(*gepInst.getResult()).getRawName() +
1021 ".addr",
1022 structTy);
1023 builder_.CreateStore(ptr, tmp);
1024 structPtr = tmp;
1025 }
1026 gep = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
1027 structTy, structPtr, static_cast<unsigned>(gepInst.getIndex()),
1028 static_cast<const Register &>(*gepInst.getResult()).getRawName());
1029 } else if (baseType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
1030 auto classType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(baseType);
1031 auto *objectTy = structCache_.at(classType->getCodegenName() + ".obj");
1032 llvm::Value *objectPtr = ptr;
1033 gep = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
1034 objectTy, objectPtr,
1035 static_cast<unsigned>(gepInst.getIndex() + kClassFieldStartIndex),
1036 static_cast<const Register &>(*gepInst.getResult()).getRawName());
1037 } else {
1038 llvm::Value *basePtr = ptr;
1039 llvm::Value *index =
1040 gepInst.getIndexValue()
1041 ? lowerZIRRValue(gepInst.getIndexValue())
1042 : llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_),
1043 gepInst.getIndex());
1044 if (baseType->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Array) {
1045 auto *arrayTy = toLLVMType(*baseType);
1046 if (!pointerType) {
1047 auto *tmp = createEntryAlloca(
1048 currentFn_,
1049 static_cast<const Register &>(*gepInst.getResult()).getRawName() +
1050 ".array.addr",
1051 arrayTy);
1052 builder_.CreateStore(ptr, tmp);
1053 basePtr = tmp;
1054 }
1055 auto *i32Ty = llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_);
1056 llvm::Value *indices[] = {llvm::ConstantInt::get(i32Ty, 0), index};
1057 gep = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(
1058 arrayTy, basePtr, indices,
1059 static_cast<const Register &>(*gepInst.getResult()).getRawName());
1060 } else {
1061 if (!pointerType) {
1062 throw std::runtime_error("ZIR getelementptr expects pointer operand");
1063 }
1064 auto *elemTy = toLLVMType(*baseType);
1065 gep = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(
1066 elemTy, ptr, index,
1067 static_cast<const Register &>(*gepInst.getResult()).getRawName());
1068 }
1069 }
1070 zirValueMap_[gepInst.getResult().get()] = gep;
1071 return;
1072 }
1073 case OpCode::Phi: {
1074 const auto &phiInst = static_cast<const PhiInst &>(inst);
1075 auto *phi = builder_.CreatePHI(
1076 toLLVMType(*phiInst.getResult()->getType()),
1077 phiInst.getIncoming().size(),
1078 static_cast<const Register &>(*phiInst.getResult()).getRawName());
1079 bool phiOwnsClassValue = isClassType(phiInst.getResult()->getType());
1080 for (const auto &incoming : phiInst.getIncoming()) {
1081 auto blockIt = zirBlockExitMap_.find(incoming.first);
1082 auto *incomingBlock = blockIt != zirBlockExitMap_.end()
1083 ? blockIt->second
1084 : zirBlockMap_.at(incoming.first);
1085 phi->addIncoming(lowerZIRValue(incoming.second), incomingBlock);
1086 if (phiOwnsClassValue &&
1087 zirOwnedClassValues_.count(incoming.second.get()) == 0) {
1088 phiOwnsClassValue = false;
1089 }
1090 }
1091 zirValueMap_[phiInst.getResult().get()] = phi;
1092 if (phiOwnsClassValue) {
1093 zirOwnedClassValues_.insert(phiInst.getResult().get());
1094 }
1095 return;
1096 }
1097 case OpCode::Cast: {
1098 const auto &castInst = static_cast<const CastInst &>(inst);
1099 auto *result =
1100 lowerZIRCast(lowerZIRRValue(castInst.getSource()),
1101 castInst.getSource()->getType(), castInst.getTargetType());
1102 zirValueMap_[castInst.getResult().get()] = result;
1103 if (isClassType(castInst.getTargetType()) &&
1104 zirOwnedClassValues_.count(castInst.getSource().get()) > 0) {
1105 zirOwnedClassValues_.insert(castInst.getResult().get());
1106 zirOwnedClassValues_.erase(castInst.getSource().get());
1107 }
1108 return;
1109 }
1110 case OpCode::WeakLock: {
1111 const auto &weakLockInst = static_cast<const WeakLockInst &>(inst);
1112 auto *result = emitWeakLock(lowerZIRRValue(weakLockInst.getWeakValue()),
1113 weakLockInst.getWeakValue()->getType());
1114 zirValueMap_[weakLockInst.getResult().get()] = result;
1115 if (isClassType(weakLockInst.getResult()->getType())) {
1116 zirOwnedClassValues_.insert(weakLockInst.getResult().get());
1117 }
1118 return;
1119 }
1120 case OpCode::WeakAlive: {
1121 const auto &weakAliveInst = static_cast<const WeakAliveInst &>(inst);
1122 auto *result = emitWeakAlive(lowerZIRRValue(weakAliveInst.getWeakValue()),
1123 weakAliveInst.getWeakValue()->getType());
1124 zirValueMap_[weakAliveInst.getResult().get()] = result;
1125 return;
1126 }
1127 case OpCode::Alloc: {
1128 const auto &allocInst = static_cast<const AllocInst &>(inst);
1129 auto allocType = allocInst.getAllocatedType();
1130 if (allocType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Class) {
1131 throw std::runtime_error("ZIR alloc currently supports only class types");
1132 }
1133
1134 auto classType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(allocType);
1135 auto *ptrTy = llvm::cast<llvm::PointerType>(toLLVMType(*classType));
1136 auto *objectTy = structCache_.at(classType->getCodegenName() + ".obj");
1137 auto *sizeOfObj = llvm::ConstantExpr::getSizeOf(objectTy);
1138 auto *sizeTy = llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_);
1139 llvm::Value *sizeValue = sizeOfObj;
1140 if (sizeValue->getType() != sizeTy) {
1141 sizeValue = builder_.CreateIntCast(sizeValue, sizeTy, /*isSigned=*/false);
1142 }
1143
1144 auto mallocIt = functionMap_.find("malloc");
1145 if (mallocIt == functionMap_.end()) {
1146 auto *mallocTy = llvm::FunctionType::get(
1147 llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_)), {sizeTy},
1148 false);
1149 auto *mallocFn = llvm::Function::Create(
1150 mallocTy, llvm::Function::ExternalLinkage, "malloc", *module_);
1151 mallocIt = functionMap_.emplace("malloc", mallocFn).first;
1152 }
1153
1154 auto *rawPtr =
1155 builder_.CreateCall(mallocIt->second, {sizeValue}, "class.alloc");
1156 auto *typedPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(rawPtr, ptrTy, "class.obj");
1157
1158 auto *refCountAddr =
1159 builder_.CreateStructGEP(objectTy, typedPtr, 0, "refcount.addr");
1160 builder_.CreateStore(
1161 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_), 1), refCountAddr);
1162 auto *weakCountAddr =
1163 builder_.CreateStructGEP(objectTy, typedPtr, 1, "weakcount.addr");
1164 builder_.CreateStore(
1165 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_), 0), weakCountAddr);
1166 auto *aliveAddr =
1167 builder_.CreateStructGEP(objectTy, typedPtr, 2, "alive.addr");
1168 builder_.CreateStore(llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_), 1),
1169 aliveAddr);
1170 auto *gcMarkAddr =
1171 builder_.CreateStructGEP(objectTy, typedPtr, 3, "gcmark.addr");
1172 builder_.CreateStore(llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_), 0),
1173 gcMarkAddr);
1174 auto *releaseFnAddr =
1175 builder_.CreateStructGEP(objectTy, typedPtr, 4, "release.fn.addr");
1176 auto *releaseFnPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
1177 classReleaseFns_.at(classType->getName()),
1178 llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_)));
1179 builder_.CreateStore(releaseFnPtr, releaseFnAddr);
1180 auto *destroyFnAddr =
1181 builder_.CreateStructGEP(objectTy, typedPtr, 5, "destroy.fn.addr");
1182 auto *destroyFnPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
1183 classDestroyFns_.at(classType->getName()),
1184 llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_)));
1185 builder_.CreateStore(destroyFnPtr, destroyFnAddr);
1186 auto *metadataAddr = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
1187 objectTy, typedPtr, kClassMetadataIndex, "metadata.addr");
1188 auto *metadataPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
1189 classMetadataGlobals_.at(classType->getName()),
1190 llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_)));
1191 builder_.CreateStore(metadataPtr, metadataAddr);
1192 auto *vtableAddr = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
1193 objectTy, typedPtr, kClassVTableIndex, "vtable.addr");
1194 auto *i8PtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_));
1195 auto *vtablePtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(i8PtrTy);
1196 auto *vtableGlobal = classVTables_.at(classType->getName());
1197 auto *zero = llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 0);
1198 llvm::Constant *vtableIndices[] = {zero, zero};
1199 auto *vtablePtr = llvm::ConstantExpr::getInBoundsGetElementPtr(
1200 vtableGlobal->getValueType(), vtableGlobal, vtableIndices);
1201 builder_.CreateStore(llvm::ConstantExpr::getBitCast(vtablePtr, vtablePtrTy),
1202 vtableAddr);
1203
1204 for (size_t i = 0; i < classType->getFields().size(); ++i) {
1205 auto *fieldAddr = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
1206 objectTy, typedPtr, static_cast<unsigned>(i + kClassFieldStartIndex));
1207 builder_.CreateStore(llvm::Constant::getNullValue(
1208 toLLVMType(*classType->getFields()[i].type)),
1209 fieldAddr);
1210 }
1211
1212 zirValueMap_[allocInst.getResult().get()] = typedPtr;
1213 zirOwnedClassValues_.insert(allocInst.getResult().get());
1214 return;
1215 }
1216 case OpCode::InlineAsm: {
1217 const auto &asmInst = static_cast<const InlineAsmInst &>(inst);
1218 std::vector<std::string> outConstraints, inConstraints;
1219 std::vector<llvm::Value *> outAddrs, inValues;
1220 std::vector<llvm::Type *> outValueTypes;
1221 for (const auto &out : asmInst.getOutputs()) {
1222 outConstraints.push_back(out.constraint);
1223 outAddrs.push_back(lowerZIRValue(out.value));
1224 outValueTypes.push_back(toLLVMType(*out.valueType));
1225 }
1226 for (const auto &in : asmInst.getInputs()) {
1227 inConstraints.push_back(in.constraint);
1228 inValues.push_back(lowerZIRRValue(in.value));
1229 }
1230 buildInlineAsmCall(asmInst.getAssembly(), outConstraints, outAddrs,
1231 outValueTypes, inConstraints, inValues,
1232 asmInst.getClobbers());
1233 return;
1234 }
1235 case OpCode::Retain:
1236 case OpCode::Release:
1237 throw std::runtime_error("ZIR opcode not lowered yet in LLVM backend");
1238 }
1239}

48 globalValues_[global->getLinkName()] = gv;

50

54 llvm::GlobalVariable::ExternalLinkage,
55 llvm::Constant::getNullValue(valueTy),
56 global->getLinkName());
57 globalValues_[global->getLinkName()] = gv;

64 initializer = lowerZIRConstant(
65 static_cast<const zir::Constant &>(*global->getInitializer()));

69 static_cast<const zir::AggregateConstant &>(

71 } else if (global->getInitializer()->getKind() ==
72 zir::ValueKind::ArrayConstant) {
73 initializer = lowerZIRArrayConstant(
74 static_cast<const zir::ArrayConstant &>(*global->getInitializer()));
75 } else if (global->getInitializer()->getKind() ==
76 zir::ValueKind::GlobalAddress) {
77 const auto &address =
78 static_cast<const zir::GlobalAddress &>(*global->getInitializer());
79 auto target = globalValues_.find(address.getLinkName());
80 if (target != globalValues_.end()) {
81 initializer = target->second;
82 if (address.getArrayIndex()) {
83 auto *zero =
84 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_), 0);
85 auto *index = llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_),
86 *address.getArrayIndex());
87 llvm::Constant *indices[] = {zero, index};
88 initializer = llvm::ConstantExpr::getInBoundsGetElementPtr(
89 target->second->getValueType(), target->second, indices);
90 }
91 }
92 }
93 }
94 if (!initializer) {
95 initializer =
96 llvm::Constant::getNullValue(toLLVMType(*global->getValueType()));
97 }
98
99 globalValues_.at(global->getLinkName())->setInitializer(initializer);
100 }
101
102 for (const auto &func : module.getExternalFunctions()) {
103 zirFunctionMap_[func->name] = func.get();
104 declareZIRFunction(*func, true);
105 }
106 for (const auto &func : module.getFunctions()) {
107 zirFunctionMap_[func->name] = func.get();
108 declareZIRFunction(*func, false);
109 auto *llvmFn = functionMap_.at(func->name);
110 if (func->isDestructor && !func->ownerTypeName.empty()) {
111 classDestructorFns_[func->ownerTypeName] = llvmFn;
112 }
113 if (func->vtableSlot >= 0 && !func->ownerTypeName.empty()) {
114 classVirtualMethodFns_[func->ownerTypeName][func->vtableSlot] = llvmFn;
115 }
116 }
117 for (const auto &type : module.getTypes()) {
118 if (type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
119 finalizeClassStruct(static_cast<const zir::ClassType &>(*type));
120 }
121 }
122 computeCyclicClasses(module);
123 for (const auto &type : module.getTypes()) {
124 if (type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Class) {
125 ensureClassArcSupport(std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(type));
126 }
127 }
128 for (const auto &func : module.getFunctions()) {
129 emitZIRFunction(*func);
130 }
131}

431 if (it != structCache_.end())
432 return it->second;
433
434 auto *structTy = llvm::StructType::create(ctx_, tu.getCodegenName());
435 structCache_[tu.getCodegenName()] = structTy;
436
437 llvm::Type *payloadStorageTy = llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_);
438 uint64_t payloadStorageSize = 0;
439 uint64_t payloadStorageAlign = 0;
440 for (const auto &variant : tu.getVariants()) {
441 if (!variant.payloadType)
442 continue;
443 auto *candidateTy = toLLVMType(*variant.payloadType);
444 auto candidateSize =
445 module_->getDataLayout().getTypeAllocSize(candidateTy);
446 auto candidateAlign =
447 module_->getDataLayout().getABITypeAlign(candidateTy).value();
448 if (candidateSize > payloadStorageSize ||
449 (candidateSize == payloadStorageSize &&
450 candidateAlign > payloadStorageAlign)) {
451 payloadStorageTy = candidateTy;
452 payloadStorageSize = candidateSize;
453 payloadStorageAlign = candidateAlign;
454 }
455 }
456
457 structTy->setBody({llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), payloadStorageTy});
458 return structTy;
459 }
460 case zir::TypeKind::Record: {
461 const auto &rt = static_cast<const zir::RecordType &>(ty);
462 auto it = structCache_.find(rt.getCodegenName());
463 if (it != structCache_.end())
464 return it->second;
465
466 if (isStringRecordName(rt.getName())) {
467 auto *structTy = llvm::StructType::create(ctx_, rt.getCodegenName());
468 structCache_[rt.getCodegenName()] = structTy;
469 std::vector<llvm::Type *> fieldTypes;
470 fieldTypes.push_back(
471 llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_)));
472 fieldTypes.push_back(llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_));
473 structTy->setBody(fieldTypes, rt.isPacked);
474 return structTy;
475 }
476
477 auto *structTy = llvm::StructType::create(ctx_, rt.getCodegenName());
478 structCache_[rt.getCodegenName()] = structTy;
479 std::vector<llvm::Type *> fieldTypes;
480 for (const auto &f : rt.getFields())
481 fieldTypes.push_back(toLLVMAggregateFieldType(f.type));
482 structTy->setBody(fieldTypes, rt.isPacked);
483 return structTy;
484 }
485 case zir::TypeKind::Class: {
486 const auto &ct = static_cast<const zir::ClassType &>(ty);
487 return llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(getOrCreateClassStruct(ct));
488 }
489 case zir::TypeKind::Array: {
490 const auto &at = static_cast<const zir::ArrayType &>(ty);
491 return llvm::ArrayType::get(toLLVMType(*at.getBaseType()), at.getSize());
492 }
493 case zir::TypeKind::FunctionPointer: {
494 const auto &ft = static_cast<const zir::FunctionPointerType &>(ty);
495 std::vector<llvm::Type *> paramTypes;
496 for (const auto &p : ft.getParams())
497 paramTypes.push_back(toLLVMType(*p));
498 auto *fnTy = llvm::FunctionType::get(toLLVMType(*ft.getReturnType()),
499 paramTypes, false);
500 return llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(fnTy);
501 }
502 default:
503 break;
504 }
505 throw std::runtime_error("Unknown ZIR type: " + ty.toString());

278

282 leftBB);
283 phi->addIncoming(rhs, actualRhsBB);
284 lastValue_ = phi;
285 return;
286 }
287
288 if (node.op == "||") {
289 auto *rhsBB = llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, "or.rhs", currentFn_);
290 auto *mergeBB = llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, "or.merge", currentFn_);
291
292 node.left->accept(*this);
293 auto *lhs = lastValue_;
294 auto *leftBB = builder_.GetInsertBlock();
295 builder_.CreateCondBr(lhs, mergeBB, rhsBB);
296
297 builder_.SetInsertPoint(rhsBB);
298 node.right->accept(*this);
299 auto *rhs = lastValue_;
300 auto *actualRhsBB = builder_.GetInsertBlock();
301 builder_.CreateBr(mergeBB);
302
303 builder_.SetInsertPoint(mergeBB);
304 auto *phi = builder_.CreatePHI(llvm::Type::getInt1Ty(ctx_), 2, "or.res");
305 phi->addIncoming(llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt1Ty(ctx_), 1),
306 leftBB);
307 phi->addIncoming(rhs, actualRhsBB);
308 lastValue_ = phi;
309 return;
310 }
311
312 node.left->accept(*this);
313 auto *lhs = lastValue_;
314 node.right->accept(*this);
315 auto *rhs = lastValue_;
316
317 bool isPointer =
318 lhs->getType()->isPointerTy() || rhs->getType()->isPointerTy();
319 bool isFP = lhs->getType()->isFloatingPointTy();
320 bool isUnsigned = node.left->type->isUnsigned();
321
322 if (isPointer && (node.op == "+" || node.op == "-")) {
323 llvm::Value *pointerValue = lhs->getType()->isPointerTy() ? lhs : rhs;
324 llvm::Value *offsetValue = lhs->getType()->isPointerTy() ? rhs : lhs;
325 auto ptrType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::PointerType>(
326 lhs->getType()->isPointerTy() ? node.left->type : node.right->type);
327 auto *elemTy = toLLVMType(*ptrType->getBaseType());
328
329 if (lhs->getType()->isPointerTy() && rhs->getType()->isPointerTy()) {
330 auto *i64Ty = llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_);
331 auto *lhsInt = builder_.CreatePtrToInt(lhs, i64Ty);
332 auto *rhsInt = builder_.CreatePtrToInt(rhs, i64Ty);
333 auto *bytes = builder_.CreateSub(lhsInt, rhsInt);
334 llvm::Value *elemSize64 = llvm::ConstantExpr::getSizeOf(elemTy);
335 if (elemSize64->getType() != i64Ty) {
336 elemSize64 =
337 builder_.CreateIntCast(elemSize64, i64Ty, /*isSigned=*/false);
338 }
339 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateSDiv(bytes, elemSize64);
340 return;
341 }
342
343 auto *indexTy = llvm::Type::getInt64Ty(ctx_);
344 auto *index =
345 builder_.CreateIntCast(offsetValue, indexTy, /*isSigned=*/true);
346 if (node.op == "-") {
347 index = builder_.CreateNeg(index);
348 }
349 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(elemTy, pointerValue, index);
350 return;
351 }
352
353 if (node.op == "-")
354 lastValue_ =
355 isFP ? builder_.CreateFSub(lhs, rhs) : builder_.CreateSub(lhs, rhs);
356 else if (node.op == "*")
357 lastValue_ =
358 isFP ? builder_.CreateFMul(lhs, rhs) : builder_.CreateMul(lhs, rhs);
359 else if (node.op == "/")
360 lastValue_ = isFP ? builder_.CreateFDiv(lhs, rhs)
361 : (isUnsigned ? builder_.CreateUDiv(lhs, rhs)
362 : builder_.CreateSDiv(lhs, rhs));
363 else if (node.op == "%")
364 lastValue_ = isFP ? builder_.CreateFRem(lhs, rhs)
365 : (isUnsigned ? builder_.CreateURem(lhs, rhs)
366 : builder_.CreateSRem(lhs, rhs));
367 else if (node.op == "<<")
368 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateShl(lhs, rhs);
369 else if (node.op == ">>")
370 lastValue_ = isUnsigned ? builder_.CreateLShr(lhs, rhs)
371 : builder_.CreateAShr(lhs, rhs);
372 else if (node.op == "&")
373 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateAnd(lhs, rhs);
374 else if (node.op == "|")
375 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateOr(lhs, rhs);
376 else if (node.op == "^")
377 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateXor(lhs, rhs);
378 else if ((node.op == "==" || node.op == "!=") &&
379 isStringType(node.left->type) && isStringType(node.right->type)) {
380 auto *boolTy = llvm::Type::getInt1Ty(ctx_);
381 auto *strTy = lhs->getType();
382 auto *eqFnTy = llvm::FunctionType::get(boolTy, {strTy, strTy}, false);
383 auto eqCallee = module_->getOrInsertFunction("eq", eqFnTy);
384 auto *isEq =
385 builder_.CreateCall(eqFnTy, eqCallee.getCallee(), {lhs, rhs}, "str.eq");
386 lastValue_ = node.op == "==" ? isEq : builder_.CreateNot(isEq, "str.ne");
387 } else if (node.op == "==")
388 lastValue_ = isFP ? builder_.CreateFCmpOEQ(lhs, rhs)
389 : builder_.CreateICmpEQ(lhs, rhs);
390 else if (node.op == "!=")
391 lastValue_ = isFP ? builder_.CreateFCmpONE(lhs, rhs)
392 : builder_.CreateICmpNE(lhs, rhs);
393 else if (node.op == "<")
394 lastValue_ = isFP ? builder_.CreateFCmpOLT(lhs, rhs)
395 : (isUnsigned ? builder_.CreateICmpULT(lhs, rhs)
396 : builder_.CreateICmpSLT(lhs, rhs));
397 else if (node.op == "<=")
398 lastValue_ = isFP ? builder_.CreateFCmpOLE(lhs, rhs)
399 : (isUnsigned ? builder_.CreateICmpULE(lhs, rhs)
400 : builder_.CreateICmpSLE(lhs, rhs));
401 else if (node.op == ">")
402 lastValue_ = isFP ? builder_.CreateFCmpOGT(lhs, rhs)
403 : (isUnsigned ? builder_.CreateICmpUGT(lhs, rhs)
404 : builder_.CreateICmpSGT(lhs, rhs));
405 else if (node.op == ">=")
406 lastValue_ = isFP ? builder_.CreateFCmpOGE(lhs, rhs)
407 : (isUnsigned ? builder_.CreateICmpUGE(lhs, rhs)
408 : builder_.CreateICmpSGE(lhs, rhs));
409 else if (node.op == "+") {
410 if (isStringType(node.left->type) || isStringType(node.right->type) ||
411 node.left->type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Char ||
412 node.right->type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Char) {
413 lastValue_ = emitStringConcat(lhs, rhs, node.left->type, node.right->type,
414 node.type);
415 } else {
416 lastValue_ =
417 isFP ? builder_.CreateFAdd(lhs, rhs) : builder_.CreateAdd(lhs, rhs);
418 }
419 }
420}

108
109 if (destBits > srcBits) {
110 if (node.expression->type->isUnsigned() ||

116 lastValue_ = srcConst ? llvm::ConstantExpr::getCast(

118 : builder_.CreateSExt(src, destTy);
119 }
120 } else if (destBits < srcBits) {

124 lastValue_ = src;

126 } else if (srcTy->isIntegerTy() && destTy->isFloatingPointTy()) {
127 if (node.expression->type->isUnsigned()) {

131 } else {

136 } else if (srcTy->isFloatingPointTy() && destTy->isIntegerTy()) {

144 : builder_.CreateFPToSI(src, destTy);

146 } else if (srcTy->isFloatingPointTy() && destTy->isFloatingPointTy()) {
147 if (srcTy->getPrimitiveSizeInBits() < destTy->getPrimitiveSizeInBits()) {

155 : builder_.CreateFPTrunc(src, destTy);

158 }

490 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.arguments.size(); ++i) {
491 bool isRef = false;
492 if (i < fixedParamCount && i < node.argumentIsRef.size())
493 isRef = node.argumentIsRef[i];
494
495 bool old = evaluateAsAddr_;
496 evaluateAsAddr_ = isRef; // false for value args, true for ref args
497
498 node.arguments[i]->accept(*this);
499 if (!isRef && i < fixedParamCount) {
500 const auto &param = node.symbol->parameters[i];
501 bool isBorrowedSelf =
502 node.symbol->isMethod && !node.symbol->isStatic && i == 0;
503 if (!isBorrowedSelf && isClassType(param->type) &&
504 !isWeakClassType(param->type) &&
505 !expressionProducesOwnedClass(node.arguments[i].get())) {
506 emitRetainIfNeeded(lastValue_, param->type);
507 }
508 }
509 args.push_back(lastValue_);
510
511 evaluateAsAddr_ = old;
512 }
513
514 if (node.symbol->hasVariadicParameter()) {
515 auto variadicParam = node.symbol->variadicParameter();
516 auto *elemTy = toLLVMType(*variadicParam->variadic_element_type);
517 auto *elemPtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(elemTy);
518 size_t explicitVariadicCount = node.arguments.size() - fixedParamCount;
519
520 llvm::Value *forwardedCount =
521 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 0);
522 llvm::Value *forwardedData = llvm::ConstantPointerNull::get(elemPtrTy);
523 if (node.variadicPack) {
524 node.variadicPack->accept(*this);
525 forwardedData =
526 builder_.CreateExtractValue(lastValue_, {0}, "varargs.forward.data");
527 forwardedCount =
528 builder_.CreateExtractValue(lastValue_, {1}, "varargs.forward.len");
529 if (forwardedCount->getType() != llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_)) {
530 forwardedCount = builder_.CreateIntCast(
531 forwardedCount, llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), /*isSigned=*/true);
532 }
533 }
534
535 llvm::Value *explicitCount =
536 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_),
537 static_cast<uint64_t>(explicitVariadicCount));
538
539 if (explicitVariadicCount == 0 && !node.variadicPack) {
540 args.push_back(explicitCount);
541 args.push_back(llvm::ConstantPointerNull::get(elemPtrTy));
542 } else if (explicitVariadicCount == 0) {
543 args.push_back(forwardedCount);
544 args.push_back(forwardedData);
545 } else {
546 llvm::Value *totalCount = explicitCount;
547 if (node.variadicPack) {
548 totalCount =
549 builder_.CreateAdd(explicitCount, forwardedCount, "varargs.total");
550 }
551
552 auto *buffer = builder_.CreateAlloca(elemTy, totalCount, "varargs.buf");
553 for (size_t i = 0; i < explicitVariadicCount; ++i) {
554 auto *dst = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(
555 elemTy, buffer,
556 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_),
557 static_cast<uint64_t>(i)));
558 builder_.CreateStore(args[fixedParamCount + i], dst);
559 }
560
561 if (node.variadicPack) {
562 auto *copyCondBB =
563 llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, "varargs.copy.cond", currentFn_);
564 auto *copyBodyBB =
565 llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, "varargs.copy.body", currentFn_);
566 auto *copyDoneBB =
567 llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, "varargs.copy.done", currentFn_);
568 auto *copyPreheaderBB = builder_.GetInsertBlock();
569
570 builder_.CreateBr(copyCondBB);
571 builder_.SetInsertPoint(copyCondBB);
572 auto *indexPhi =
573 builder_.CreatePHI(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 2, "varargs.i");
574 indexPhi->addIncoming(
575 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 0),
576 copyPreheaderBB);
577 auto *hasMore = builder_.CreateICmpSLT(indexPhi, forwardedCount);
578 builder_.CreateCondBr(hasMore, copyBodyBB, copyDoneBB);
579
580 builder_.SetInsertPoint(copyBodyBB);
581 auto *src = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(elemTy, forwardedData, indexPhi);
582 auto *dstIndex = builder_.CreateAdd(explicitCount, indexPhi);
583 auto *dst = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(elemTy, buffer, dstIndex);
584 auto *loaded = builder_.CreateLoad(elemTy, src);
585 builder_.CreateStore(loaded, dst);
586 auto *nextIndex = builder_.CreateAdd(
587 indexPhi, llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 1));
588 builder_.CreateBr(copyCondBB);
589 indexPhi->addIncoming(nextIndex, copyBodyBB);
590
591 builder_.SetInsertPoint(copyDoneBB);
592 }
593
594 args.resize(fixedParamCount);
595 args.push_back(totalCount);
596 args.push_back(buffer);
597 }
598 }
599 if (node.symbol->vtableSlot >= 0 && !args.empty()) {
600 auto classType =
601 std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(node.arguments[0]->type);
602 auto *objectTy = structCache_.at(classType->getCodegenName() + ".obj");
603 auto *selfPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
604 args[0], llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(objectTy), "method.self");
605 auto *vtableAddr = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
606 objectTy, selfPtr, kClassVTableIndex, "method.vtable.addr");
607 auto *i8PtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_));
608 auto *vtablePtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(i8PtrTy);
609 auto *vtablePtr =
610 builder_.CreateLoad(vtablePtrTy, vtableAddr, "method.vtable");
611 auto *slotAddr = builder_.CreateInBoundsGEP(
612 i8PtrTy, vtablePtr,
613 llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_),
614 static_cast<uint64_t>(node.symbol->vtableSlot)));
615 auto *fnRaw = builder_.CreateLoad(i8PtrTy, slotAddr, "method.fn.raw");
616 auto *fnPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
617 fnRaw, llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(callee->getFunctionType()),
618 "method.fn");
619 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateCall(callee->getFunctionType(), fnPtr, args);
620 if (node.symbol->returnsRef && !evaluateAsAddr_) {
621 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateLoad(toLLVMType(*node.symbol->returnType),
622 lastValue_, "ref.load");
623 }
624 return;
625 }
626
627 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateCall(callee, args);
628
629 if (node.symbol->returnsRef && !evaluateAsAddr_) {
630 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateLoad(toLLVMType(*node.symbol->returnType),
631 lastValue_, "ref.load");
632 }
633
634 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.arguments.size() && i < fixedParamCount; ++i) {
635 if (i < node.argumentIsRef.size() && node.argumentIsRef[i]) {
636 continue;
637 }
638 const auto &param = node.symbol->parameters[i];
639 if (isWeakClassType(param->type) &&
640 expressionProducesOwnedClass(node.arguments[i].get())) {
641 auto strongType = std::make_shared<zir::ClassType>(
642 *std::static_pointer_cast<zir::ClassType>(param->type));
643 strongType->setWeak(false);
644 emitReleaseIfNeeded(args[i], strongType);
645 }
646 }
647}

void codegen::LLVMCodeGen::visit ( sema::BoundFunctionDeclaration & node)
overridevirtual

Implements sema::BoundVisitor.

755 {
756 auto *fn = functionMap_.at(node.symbol->linkName);
757 currentFn_ = fn;
758 localValues_.clear();
759 scopeClassLocals_.clear();
760 scopeStringLocals_.clear();
761 scopeClassLocals_.push_back({});
762 scopeStringLocals_.push_back({});
763
764 auto *entry = llvm::BasicBlock::Create(ctx_, "entry", fn);
765 builder_.SetInsertPoint(entry);
766
767 auto argIt = fn->arg_begin();
768 if (!freestanding_ && node.symbol->linkName == "main") {
769 auto *i32Ty = llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_);
770 auto *i8PtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_));
771 auto *argvTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(i8PtrTy);
772
773 argIt->setName("argc");
774 llvm::Value *argcValue = &*argIt++;
775 argIt->setName("argv");
776 llvm::Value *argvValue = &*argIt++;
777
778 auto setArgsIt2 = functionMap_.find("__zap_process_set_args");
779 if (setArgsIt2 == functionMap_.end()) {
780 auto *ft = llvm::FunctionType::get(llvm::Type::getVoidTy(ctx_),
781 {i32Ty, argvTy}, false);
782 auto *setArgsFn =
783 llvm::Function::Create(ft, llvm::Function::ExternalLinkage,
784 "__zap_process_set_args", *module_);
785 setArgsIt2 =
786 functionMap_.emplace("__zap_process_set_args", setArgsFn).first;
787 }
788
789 builder_.CreateCall(
790 setArgsIt2->second,
791 {builder_.CreateIntCast(argcValue, i32Ty, true), argvValue});
792 }
793
794 // Spill each argument to a stack slot so we can reassign params later.
795 size_t idx = 0;
796 for (; argIt != fn->arg_end(); ++argIt) {
797 const auto &param = node.symbol->parameters[idx++];
798 if (param->is_variadic_pack) {
799 auto &countArg = *argIt;
800 ++argIt;
801 auto &dataArg = *argIt;
802 auto *sliceTy = static_cast<llvm::StructType *>(toLLVMType(*param->type));
803 auto *sliceAlloca = createEntryAlloca(fn, param->name, sliceTy);
804 llvm::Value *sliceValue = llvm::PoisonValue::get(sliceTy);
805 sliceValue = builder_.CreateInsertValue(sliceValue, &dataArg, {0},
806 param->name + ".data");
807 llvm::Value *countValue = &countArg;
808 if (countValue->getType() != sliceTy->getElementType(1)) {
809 countValue = builder_.CreateIntCast(
810 countValue, sliceTy->getElementType(1),
811 /*isSigned=*/true, param->name + ".len.cast");
812 }
813 sliceValue = builder_.CreateInsertValue(sliceValue, countValue, {1},
814 param->name + ".len");
815 builder_.CreateStore(sliceValue, sliceAlloca);
816 localValues_[param->name] = sliceAlloca;
817 continue;
818 }
819
820 auto &arg = *argIt;
821 auto *alloca = createEntryAlloca(fn, param->name, arg.getType());
822 localValues_[param->name] = alloca;
823 if (isClassType(param->type) && !param->is_ref) {
824 bool isBorrowedSelf =
825 node.symbol->isMethod && !node.symbol->isStatic && idx == 1;
826 builder_.CreateStore(llvm::Constant::getNullValue(arg.getType()), alloca);
827 if (isWeakClassType(param->type)) {
828 emitStoreWithArc(alloca, &arg, param->type, /*valueIsOwned=*/false);
829 scopeClassLocals_.back().push_back({param->type, alloca});
830 } else if (!isBorrowedSelf) {
831 builder_.CreateStore(&arg, alloca);
832 scopeClassLocals_.back().push_back({param->type, alloca});
833 } else {
834 builder_.CreateStore(&arg, alloca);
835 }
836 } else {
837 if (isOwnedStringType(param->type)) {
838 builder_.CreateStore(llvm::Constant::getNullValue(arg.getType()),
839 alloca);
840 emitStoreWithStringArc(alloca, &arg, param->type,
841 /*valueIsOwned=*/false);
842 scopeStringLocals_.back().push_back({param->type, alloca});
843 continue;
844 }
845 builder_.CreateStore(&arg, alloca);
846 }
847 }
848
849 node.body->accept(*this);
850
851 if (!builder_.GetInsertBlock()->getTerminator()) {
852 if (node.body->result) {
853 for (auto it = scopeClassLocals_.rbegin(); it != scopeClassLocals_.rend();
854 ++it) {
855 for (auto local = it->rbegin(); local != it->rend(); ++local) {
856 auto *value = builder_.CreateLoad(
857 toLLVMType(*local->first), local->second, "arc.fn.ret.release");
858 if (isWeakClassType(local->first))
859 emitReleaseWeakIfNeeded(value, local->first);
860 else
861 emitReleaseIfNeeded(value, local->first);
862 }
863 }
864 for (auto it = scopeStringLocals_.rbegin();
865 it != scopeStringLocals_.rend(); ++it) {
866 for (auto local = it->rbegin(); local != it->rend(); ++local) {
867 auto *value = builder_.CreateLoad(
868 toLLVMType(*local->first), local->second, "str.fn.ret.release");
869 emitStringReleaseIfNeeded(value, local->first);
870 }
871 }
872 builder_.CreateRet(lastValue_);
873 } else if (fn->getReturnType()->isVoidTy()) {
874 for (auto it = scopeClassLocals_.rbegin(); it != scopeClassLocals_.rend();
875 ++it) {
876 for (auto local = it->rbegin(); local != it->rend(); ++local) {
877 auto *value = builder_.CreateLoad(
878 toLLVMType(*local->first), local->second, "arc.fn.ret.release");
879 if (isWeakClassType(local->first))
880 emitReleaseWeakIfNeeded(value, local->first);
881 else
882 emitReleaseIfNeeded(value, local->first);
883 }
884 }
885 for (auto it = scopeStringLocals_.rbegin();
886 it != scopeStringLocals_.rend(); ++it) {
887 for (auto local = it->rbegin(); local != it->rend(); ++local) {
888 auto *value = builder_.CreateLoad(
889 toLLVMType(*local->first), local->second, "str.fn.ret.release");
890 emitStringReleaseIfNeeded(value, local->first);
891 }
892 }
893 builder_.CreateRetVoid();
894 }
895 }
896
897 currentFn_ = nullptr;
898 scopeClassLocals_.clear();
899 scopeStringLocals_.clear();
900}

195 switch (node.value[1]) {
196 case 'n':
197 code = '\n';
198 break;
199 case 't':
200 code = '\t';
201 break;
202 case 'r':
203 code = '\r';
204 break;
205 case '\\':
206 code = '\\';
207 break;
208 case '\'':
209 code = '\'';
210 break;
211 case '0':
212 code = '\0';

228 } else {
229 lastValue_ = llvm::ConstantInt::get(ty, unsignedValue, /*isSigned=*/true);

234 lastValue_ = llvm::ConstantFP::get(ty, std::stod(node.value));

901

903

906 if (unary && unary->op == "*") {
907 // Evaluate the pointer directly, skip the dereference
908 bool old = evaluateAsAddr_;

910 unary->expr->accept(*this);
911 leftAddr = lastValue_;
912 evaluateAsAddr_ = old;
913 } else {
914 // Normal case: evaluate as address
915 bool old = evaluateAsAddr_;
916 evaluateAsAddr_ = true;

918 leftAddr = lastValue_;

920 }

930 } else {

933 }
934 return;
935 }
936
937 auto recordType = std::static_pointer_cast<zir::RecordType>(node.left->type);
938 int fieldIndex = -1;

940 for (size_t i = 0; i < fields.size(); ++i) {
941 if (fields[i].name == node.member) {
942 fieldIndex = static_cast<int>(i);
943 break;
944 }
945 }
946
947 if (fieldIndex == -1)
948 throw std::runtime_error("Field '" + node.member + "' not found in type '" +
949 node.left->type->toString() + "'");
950
951 llvm::StructType *structTy =
952 static_cast<llvm::StructType *>(toLLVMType(*recordType));
953 llvm::Value *fieldAddr =
954 builder_.CreateStructGEP(structTy, leftAddr, fieldIndex, node.member);
955
956 if (evaluateAsAddr_) {
957 lastValue_ = fieldAddr;
958 } else {

1062 gcMarkAddr);

1064 builder_.CreateStructGEP(objectTy, typedPtr, 4, "release.fn.addr");
1065 auto *releaseFnPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
1066 classReleaseFns_.at(node.classType->getName()),
1067 llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_)));
1068 builder_.CreateStore(releaseFnPtr, releaseFnAddr);
1069 auto *destroyFnAddr =
1070 builder_.CreateStructGEP(objectTy, typedPtr, 5, "destroy.fn.addr");
1071 auto *destroyFnPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
1072 classDestroyFns_.at(node.classType->getName()),
1073 llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_)));
1074 builder_.CreateStore(destroyFnPtr, destroyFnAddr);
1075 auto *metadataAddr = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
1076 objectTy, typedPtr, kClassMetadataIndex, "metadata.addr");
1077 auto *metadataPtr = builder_.CreateBitCast(
1078 classMetadataGlobals_.at(node.classType->getName()),
1079 llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_)));
1080 builder_.CreateStore(metadataPtr, metadataAddr);
1081 auto *vtableAddr = builder_.CreateStructGEP(objectTy, typedPtr,
1082 kClassVTableIndex, "vtable.addr");
1083 auto *i8PtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(llvm::Type::getInt8Ty(ctx_));
1084 auto *vtablePtrTy = llvm::PointerType::getUnqual(i8PtrTy);
1085 auto *vtableGlobal = classVTables_.at(node.classType->getName());
1086 auto *zero = llvm::ConstantInt::get(llvm::Type::getInt32Ty(ctx_), 0);
1087 llvm::Constant *vtableIndices[] = {zero, zero};
1088 auto *vtablePtr = llvm::ConstantExpr::getInBoundsGetElementPtr(
1089 vtableGlobal->getValueType(), vtableGlobal, vtableIndices);
1090 builder_.CreateStore(llvm::ConstantExpr::getBitCast(vtablePtr, vtablePtrTy),
1091 vtableAddr);
1092
1093 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.classType->getFields().size(); ++i) {
1094 auto *fieldAddr = builder_.CreateStructGEP(
1095 objectTy, typedPtr, static_cast<unsigned>(i + kClassFieldStartIndex));
1096 builder_.CreateStore(llvm::Constant::getNullValue(
1097 toLLVMType(*node.classType->getFields()[i].type)),
1098 fieldAddr);
1099 }
1100
1101 if (node.constructor) {
1102 auto *callee = functionMap_.at(node.constructor->linkName);
1103 std::vector<llvm::Value *> args;
1104 args.push_back(typedPtr);
1105 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.arguments.size(); ++i) {
1106 bool old = evaluateAsAddr_;
1107 if (i < node.argumentIsRef.size() && node.argumentIsRef[i])
1108 evaluateAsAddr_ = true;
1109 node.arguments[i]->accept(*this);
1110 args.push_back(lastValue_);
1111 evaluateAsAddr_ = old;
1112 }
1113 builder_.CreateCall(callee, args);
1114 }
1115
1116 lastValue_ = typedPtr;
1117}

706 fn->symbol->linkName, *module_);

708 if (isEntryMain) {
709 argIt->setName("argc");

732 [fn->symbol->vtableSlot] = f;

748 rec->accept(*this);

451 {

453 bool old = evaluateAsAddr_;
454 evaluateAsAddr_ = true;
455 node.expr->accept(*this);
456 evaluateAsAddr_ = old;
457 return;
458 } else if (node.op == "*") {
459 bool old = evaluateAsAddr_;
460 evaluateAsAddr_ = false;
461 node.expr->accept(*this);

475 : builder_.CreateNeg(lastValue_);
476 } else if (node.op == "!") {
477 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateNot(lastValue_);
478 } else if (node.op == "~") {
479 if (!node.type->isInteger()) {
480 throw std::runtime_error("Unary '~' requires integer operand");
481 }
482 lastValue_ = builder_.CreateNot(lastValue_);
483 }
